headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on AvalonBay Communities, Lowers Price Target to $202
summary: Barclays  analyst Richard Hightower   maintains AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $217 to $202.
